summary: The diff implements most of the required features: leaderboard screen with trophy tab in bottom nav, anime character selection screen with 8 characters across 4 franchises, autonomous CSS-based character animations, and avatar image assets referenced as static files. However, the actual avatar image files do not appear to be present in the diff (only referenced), and there are minor gaps in some acceptance criteria coverage.

missing_requirements.requirement: 8 character avatar images are available as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff references image paths like '/assets/generated/naruto-uzumaki-avatar.dim_128x128.png' in the data file, but no actual image files are listed as added files in the diff. The diff shows 5 added files and none are PNG/image assets in frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Characters move across or within their designated area on screen autonomously (spatial movement, not just in-place animation)
missing_requirements.reason: The AnimatedCharacter component applies animation classes to the image element in-place. The index.css is truncated so full keyframe definitions cannot be confirmed, but the component structure does not show characters physically traversing a screen area — only in-place animations are evident.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle schema migration from OldUserProfile to NewUserProfile with default character values
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not mention a migration module or schema migration system. This is an implementation detail added beyond the stated requirements.
